---
name: Research Finding / New Source
about: Share a new paper, result, or insight relevant to Mycelium.
title: '[RESEARCH] '
labels: ['type:research']
---

**Source / Paper**
Title, authors, year, link (arXiv, DOI, etc.)

**Relevance to Mycelium**
Which area does this impact? (VSA bounds, ternary, verified numerics, LLM leverage, etc.)

**Key takeaway**
One-paragraph summary of the important result.

**Potential impact on existing documents**
- [ ] May affect RFC-XXX
- [ ] May affect ADR-XXX
- [ ] New research record entry needed
